INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('longer string that exceeds typical length limits');
SELECT md5_number_lower(CONCAT(input_string, ' extra data')) FROM test_strings;
SELECT md5_number_lower(input_string) AS hash_value, COUNT(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY hash_value;
SELECT md5_number_lower(t1.input_string) FROM test_strings t1 JOIN (SELECT 'test' AS fizz) t2 ON t1.input_string LIKE '%test%';
SELECT md5_number_lower(t1.input_string) FROM test_strings t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT 'a' AS filter_string) t2 ON t1.input_string LIKE CONCAT('%', t2.filter_string, '%');
WITH md5_hashes AS (SELECT input_string, md5_number_lower(input_string) AS hash_value FROM test_strings) SELECT hash_value FROM md5_hashes WHERE hash_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT md5_number_lower(input_string || ' suffix') FROM test_strings WHERE input_string IS NOT NULL;
